6.2.1 UE maximum output power {#ue-maximum-output-power .unnumbered}
-----------------------------

The following UE Power Classes define the maximum output power for the
1^st^ transmission. The Bluetooth^TM^ coexistence case and P~CMAX,f,c~
limits apply, with a back-off of 10^-3^ relative to P~powerclass~.

![](media/image42.png)
